reviews.review_description: When I play, no one even was on and I thought it was a big game so I downloaded it, but it was so boring that I deleted it immediately.￼￼
So ive been playing this game and clearly you can see fake  people Playing w/ you.its boring.why dont we get to choose to join codes,private and publics?

This was honestly an impactful game, it had everything that a mech game should have except for melee, and even without that my friends and I had a blast. 

This game was great and I'd really appreciate it if they could bring back multiplayer or begin reskinning the map and avatars and make a mech game that would crush the current mech games in terms of fun and multiplayer game modes, ans maybe add a melee attack.

Fun but needs multiplayer as well as more gamemodes like maybe a boss fight game mode where 1 person starts out big and has to reach max
 height while the small people have to kill him before that. Ends when either side wins
At least where I'm from there is no one playing the game
Suck it Suck it Suck it ;)

reviews.review_title: In the middle of intense and chill
reviews.review_description: Competitive in a way that it’s fun, chill to the point I can sit down and play

I really enjoy the game. It's easy, fun and can be competitive! All things I look for in a simple game. I see now they have a store. Unfortunately I can't seem to earn any diamonds. I'm not interested in pay-to-win type games personally. But I love this game.

reviews.review_title: An elegant mix of fun and kaiju chaos
reviews.review_description: It's a simple mix of luigis mansion and katamari damacy and OMG is it fun! The guys at ForeVR really know what they're doing and keep coming up with unique ideas, this is a bit of a winner :) definitely belongs on the main store.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your review Leadboots1! Game on! Team ForeVR

reviews.review_title: Doesn’t feel like a ForeVR game
reviews.review_description:
- Beta version,

"Suck It," developed by ForeVR, initially presents itself as an intriguing addition to the VR gaming landscape, but several aspects detract from its overall enjoyment. First and foremost, the comfort level leaves much to be desired. Despite being someone who typically doesn't experience motion sickness in VR, I found myself feeling queasy after just a short period of gameplay. This issue could potentially alienate a significant portion of its audience.

Another drawback is the game's social settings. Currently, there's no option to create private group modes, forcing players to interact with random participants. This can be off-putting for those who prefer playing exclusively with friends or are wary of online interactions.

Additionally, the game's pacing and progression system are underwhelming. Levels progress slowly, and even as your abilities expand, there's a pervasive sense that you're not making any significant advancements. This lack of rewarding gameplay progression contributes to a monotonous experience that might not keep players coming back.

In conclusion, while "Suck It" offers a unique premise with the potential for fun, it's hindered by issues related to player comfort, social interaction, and pacing. Addressing these concerns could help transform this game from a mediocre experience into a standout title in the VR game market.

developer_response.body:
Hello Larry225, Thank you so much for your review! We greatly appreciate your feedback. We are sad to announce that Suck It will disabled multiplayer servers April 30th 2024. We had a blast making this game and want to leave up an offline mode of the game for fans. Unfortunately, it did not take off as we were hoping. 
Anyone can continue to download and play the game by themselves or with bots. Thank you for supporting Suck It, we are eternally grateful that you took the time to play. Please continue to follow ForeVR Games on our journey to create awesome experiences for you and your friends.   - Team ForeVR

reviews.review_description: Was fun to play waiting on game didn’t take long but not sure if people know what they where doing. cuz I was able to win ever game I play on my first go at the game. Only think I didn’t like was I felt like I was forced to use my in game currency to by a skin I could care less for. I wish I could have used it to get what I wanted rather then what I was forced to get. Now in game everyone will look the same cuz we are all forced to get the same skin 😂

reviews.review_title: Fun reminds me of Hole IO
reviews.review_description: Collect little stuff trade it in so you can collect bigger stuff and then find some stars.  Had to google directions to figure out what the final goal was.  Fun casual game.

reviews.review_description: Sorry, ForeVR, I love all your other games but this is a dud. If it stays free I'll bet kids will play it, but I couldn't uninstall it fast enough.

developer_response.body:
Hello MisssElaineous, We are bummed to hear that you did not enjoy Suck It. We are eager to know more about your experience. Did you run into any bugs? Are there things you could see added that could improve your experience? Please let us know here! 
(link: https://forevrgames.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/requests/new)
We value your feedback and are committed to improving Suck It to ensure a better experience for all players, and we hope you'll give it another try and consider recommending it to others in the future.
Thank you! Team ForeVR
